meta.description: Dr. Jorge Arce — restoring function, structure, and confidence through precision, judgment, and timeless craft. South Bay, CA.

sections.intro: Dr. Jorge Arce — an oral & maxillofacial surgeon restoring function, structure, and confidence through precision, judgment, and timeless craft. Trained in Colombia, built in California — twenty-seven years on the cases other surgeons refer out.

sections.hint: If you have been told your case is impossible, it is probably one of ours. Twenty-seven years on the difficult work.

groups.state: From a single implant to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction — planned, placed, and restored with precision.
The difficult extractions and reconstructions other clinicians prefer to refer elsewhere.
Clarity and direction for patients facing complex decisions — before anyone operates.

sections.note: Beyond the operating room, Dr. Arce lectures and mentors — training the next generation of surgeons in implantology and complex reconstruction. Available for conferences, study clubs, and resident training.

sections.title: The Process
sections.sub: What a case looks like from the first call to the final result — including the ones other surgeons said were impossible.
cells: A long, unhurried first conversation. Your history, your scans, your questions — and an honest read of what is possible.
Every case is mapped before anyone operates. The time the case actually needs, not the time the schedule allows.
Twenty-seven years of steady hands. Precision in the operating room, calm around it.
Function first, then structure, then confidence. The smile is the last step, not the first promise.
Long-term care that protects the work — with a full report back to your referring dentist, every time.

sections.text: "The work is precise. The reason behind it is human."
sections.attr: Dr. Jorge Arce · Founder, Dental Implants Center of South Bay

sections.sub: From the patients — and the referring doctors — who were there.

cells.q: I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.
When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.
The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.
I refer my most complex cases to Dr. Arce without hesitation. Twenty-seven years shows.
Reliable, communicative, and surgically excellent. A true professional.
I was terrified of the procedure. He never rushed me. Best decision I have made for my health.
Years of pain, gone. I only wish I had found him sooner. I recommend Dr. Arce to everyone I know.
The level of care and follow-up is rare. My patients trust him, and that trust reflects back on my practice.

Separating fear from fact, so you can make a calm, informed decision about your health.

sections.hint: Everything patients ask before their first visit — answered the way Dr. Arce answers in person: plainly.
rows: What happens at a first consultation?

A long, unhurried conversation. Dr. Arce reviews your history and imaging, examines the site, and gives you an honest read of what is possible — including, when it is the right answer, the recommendation not to operate.
I was told my case is impossible. Is it?
Sometimes it is — and you deserve to hear that plainly. But many of the cases in this practice arrived with that exact sentence. Complex cases are not a detour from this work; they are the work.
How do I know if I'm a candidate for implants?
Bone volume, gum health, medical history, and timing all matter. The free patient guide covers the signs — and a consultation settles it definitively with imaging.
Do you work with referring dentists?
Constantly — much of this practice arrives by referral. Every referred patient goes back with a full surgical report, and the restorative work stays with your general dentist.
